title: Foeniculum foeniculum
intro: Foeniculum vulgare, commonly known as Fennel, is a perennial herb belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae) and is native to the Mediterranean region. The health benefits of Fennel include its ability to aid digestion, alleviate nausea and bloating, and exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, making it a popular natural remedy for various gastrointestinal issues. The bioactive constituents of Fennel include anethole, fenchone, and limonene, which are responsible for its distinct flavor and medicinal properties. Fennel is commonly used to make teas, infusions, and essential oils, as well as being a key ingredient in herbal preparations such as tinctures, capsules, and dried seed supplements.
